summary: PART I Company and Business Strategy Overview As a global healthcare holding company, with operations in South Korea and Switzerland and an office in the UnitedStates, we intend to leverage our existing and expanding network of academic and industry leaders and investor network, including venture capital and private equity, in major healthcare markets globally to identify, lead and support the growth of our subsidiaries and subsidiary candidates based on innovative research.
